---
name: Contradiction report
about: Report a contradiction, authority conflict, or semantic inconsistency in AICL documentation
title: "[Contradiction]: "
labels: contradiction, specification
assignees: ""
---

## Contradiction Summary

Describe the contradiction or authority conflict.

## Affected Documents

- File:
- Section or heading:
- Conflicting file:
- Conflicting section or heading:

## Why This Matters

Explain how the contradiction affects kernel interpretation, WKG grounding, proof obligations, runtime behavior, materialization, examples, or research boundaries.

## Current Text or Claim

Quote only the minimum necessary text or summarize the conflicting claims.

## Proposed Resolution

State the mechanically stronger correction or the project-owner decision required.

## Scope

- [ ] Canonical kernel contract
- [ ] Kernel semantic support
- [ ] WKG / ontology
- [ ] Research track
- [ ] Evaluation/onboarding
- [ ] Examples
- [ ] Repository support docs

## Severity

- [ ] Critical: blocks coherent interpretation or creates unsafe/false guarantees
- [ ] Major: blocks implementation, validation, or reviewer understanding
- [ ] Minor: local inconsistency, missing cross-link, or wording ambiguity
- [ ] Question: requires project-owner decision
